name: GetPDUsTPIPv6SrcAddr
title: GetPDUsTPIPv6SrcAddr
description: This function can only be used within a on PDU handler. If the PDU was received via IPv6, with this function the IPv6 source address can be requested.

parameters.name: this
parameters.description: Handle to the currently handled (received) PDU object.

parameters.name: IPv6SourceAddress
parameters.description: IPv6 source address as 16 byte array.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
